automations.name: Daily Email Digest
automations.description: Get a smart summary of your most important emails every morning at 8am. Never miss a critical message.

automations.name: Smart Meeting Scheduler
automations.description: Say "schedule a meeting with John next Tuesday" — Poke finds a free slot, sends invites, and syncs your calendar.

automations.name: Package Delivery Tracker
automations.description: Automatically track all your packages and get notified the moment they're out for delivery.

automations.name: Web Research Brief
automations.description: Ask Poke to research any topic and receive a concise, cited summary — perfect for quick decisions.

automations.name: Sleep & Wake Routine
automations.description: Build a personalized wind-down and morning routine with gentle reminders tailored to your schedule.
